LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion.label: segmented bastion
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion.description: A draftable fused fleshbeast that can split into its own spine-firing segments and later reassemble from surviving pieces.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion.tools.0.label: spine mass
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastion.tools.1.label: central bulk
LanguageData.FB_BastionSpineSegment.label: bastion spine segment
LanguageData.FB_BastionSpineSegment.description: A living segment split from a segmented bastion. It keeps its origin identity and can fire keratin spines.
